title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.630 - Clerks shall keep book for docketing judgments
text:
511.630.  Clerks shall keep book for docketing judgments. — The clerks of courts of record shall keep in their respective offices a well-bound book for entering therein an alphabetical docket of all judgments and decrees.
(RSMo 1939 § 1294) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1129; 1919 § 1580; 1909 § 2149
